title: hieracium alatum subsp. barreranum
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. barreranum, also known as a rare species of hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium alatum subsp. barreranum include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible use in treating digestive issues and fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or tea, and its leaves and flowers are dried and used in infusions for medicinal purposes.
